testimonials.title: Built for contractors who are tired of scrolling.

items.text: I used to miss half the jobs in my groups because they were on mute. Now Lead Express sends me only what I need — I just answer and take the job.
items.name: Mike Thompson

items.text: I am in 30+ WhatsApp groups. There is no way to read them all. Lead Express goes through everything and sends me just the plumbing jobs in my area.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.text: It took 2 minutes to set up. Within an hour I got my first job straight to WhatsApp. It really works.
items.name: Carlos Rivera

items.text: Lead Express is like having someone who reads all my groups all day and only tells me about roofing jobs near me.
items.name: David Kim

items.text: I was losing jobs every week because I could not keep up with all the messages. Now I get a notification the second something comes in for me.
items.name: Jessica Park

items.text: The AI knows the difference between a real job request and just people talking. I only get real jobs. No spam.
items.name: Alex Morgan

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Lead Express

items.q: How does Lead Express find jobs for me?
items.a: Our AI watches your WhatsApp groups 24/7. It reads every message, identifies real job requests, and sends you only the ones that match your trade and county.

items.q: Can I add my own WhatsApp groups?
items.a: Yes — that's how it works. Share your group invite links, we join within 24 hours, and our AI starts scanning them for you.
You earn points for adding groups, staying active, referring friends, and giving feedback on leads. As you level up, you unlock new features and expanded reach.

items.q: How fast do I get notified?
items.a: Right away. The moment a job that fits you is posted, you get a WhatsApp message with all the details. Be the first to respond.

items.q: What can Rebeca do for me?
items.a: Rebeca is your AI assistant on WhatsApp. Ask her to check your stats, pause leads, update your trades, or give feedback on a lead — all without leaving WhatsApp.

items.q: What if I can't take a job?
items.a: Forward it to other contractors via Rebeca. You earn Network Points, and the job doesn't go to waste. Everyone wins.
About 2 minutes. Pick your trade, set your area, and share your group links. Jobs start coming in right away.

cta.title: Stop scrolling. Start getting jobs.
cta.desc: Your WhatsApp groups are full of work right now. Let our AI filter the noise and send you only what matters.
